Wedding Invitation

Natsuki & Anthony

2026.10.24 SAT

Scroll

Greeting

Dear family and friends,


We are delighted to announce that we are getting married!


We would be truly honored to have you join us

on our special day as we celebrate

the beginning of our new journey together.


We sincerely hope you can attend

and share this joyful occasion with us.


With love,

Natsuki & Anthony

Profile

Anthony

Based in Tokyo. Works as an engineer. Enjoys cooking and traveling.

Natsuki

Based in Tokyo. Works as a designer. Enjoys photography and reading.

Event Details

Ceremony

Saturday, October 24, 2026

2:00 PM–

Reception

Saturday, October 24, 2026

3:00 PM – 6:00 PM

Hotel Chinzanso Tokyo

2-10-8 Sekiguchi, Bunkyo-ku, Tokyo 112-8680

Dress code: Semi-formal

Access

Nearest station: Edogawabashi Station (Tokyo Metro Yurakucho Line), Exit 1a — 10 min walk

Bus: From Mejiro Station, take the Toei bus to "Hotel Chinzanso Tokyo-mae"

Parking: On-site parking available (paid)
